title: sticherus penniger
intro: Sticherus penniger, also known as the tree fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
